activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A dispatch workbench helps the field operations manager compare route, parts, site access, and SLA constraints before sending a repair visit handoff.
parsed.css: :root{color-scheme:light;--bg:#f5f6f1;--panel:#ffffff;--ink:#1e2422;--muted:#64706a;--line:#d9ded7;--soft:#eef2ed;--blue:#245c73;--blue-soft:#e3eef2;--green:#27634a;--green-soft:#e3f1e9;--amber:#8a5a12;--amber-soft:#fff3d6;--red:#9d342f;--red-soft:#f9e3e1;--focus:#113f67}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif;color:var(--ink);font-size:15px;line-height:1.4}.dispatch-shell{min-height:900px;padding:24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px minmax(0,1fr) 330px;gap:18px}.rail,.workspace,.handoff{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;min-width:0}.rail{padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.workspace{padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px}.handoff{padding:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}.topline{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}h1,h2,h3,p{margin:0}h1{font-size:26px;line-height:1.15;font-weight:760;letter-spacing:0}h2{font-size:17px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:720}h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:720}.muted{color:var(--muted)}.queue-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px}.count{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-soft);border-radius:999px;padding:3px 8px}.queue-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.visit-row{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;border-radius:7px;padding:10px 11px;text-align:left;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:4px 8px;color:var(--ink)}.visit-row.selected{border-color:var(--focus);box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 var(--focus);background:#f8fbfc}.visit-id{font-weight:760}.visit-state{grid-column:1 / -1;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}.sla-pill,.risk-pill,.ok-pill,.hold-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:24px;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:750;white-space:nowrap}.sla-pill{color:var(--red);background:var(--red-soft)}.risk-pill{color:var(--amber);background:var(--amber-soft)}.ok-pill{color:var(--green);background:var(--green-soft)}.hold-pill{color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-soft)}.case-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:14px}.summary-block{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;background:#fff}.summary-block strong{display:block;margin-bottom:4px}.constraint-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px}.constraint{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;background:#fff;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-height:142px}.constraint.alert{border-color:#e7b3ad;background:#fffafa}.constraint.ready{border-color:#b8d7c4;background:#fbfffc}.constraint.route{border-color:#bdd2dc;background:#fbfdfe}.fact-line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--soft);padding-top:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}.fact-line b{color:var(--ink)}.decision-panel{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;background:#fbfcfa;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}.decision{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:7px;background:#fff;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px}.decision.recommended{border-color:var(--focus);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--focus)}.decision.blocked{opacity:.72}.button-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}.btn{appearance:none;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:var(--ink);font:inherit;font-weight:720;padding:9px 11px;min-height:38px;cursor:default}.btn.primary{background:var(--focus);border-color:var(--focus);color:#fff}.btn.warning{background:var(--amber-soft);border-color:#e4c37f;color:#5f3c08}.btn.ghost{background:#f8faf7}.btn:focus{outline:3px solid #9fc2d1;outline-offset:2px}.field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}.field label{font-size:12px;font-weight:760;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.field .value{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:7px;background:#fff;padding:10px;min-height:42px}.handoff-preview{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}.note{border-left:3px solid var(--red);background:var(--red-soft);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;color:#61211d}.footer-actions{margin-top:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.divider{height:1px;background:var(--line);margin:2px 0}@media(max-width:1100px){.dispatch-shell{grid-template-columns:260px 1fr}.handoff{grid-column:1 / -1}.constraint-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.case-summary{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
parsed.html:
Same-day queue

Repair visits

3 open

Sort by service window, access blockers, and technician readiness.

Selected repair visit

V-2187 Mallory Chen

Priority repair for kitchen freezer service before the window closes.

Site access blocks dispatch
Request

Kitchen freezer repair needs dispatch before the service window closes.

Policy check

Same-day SLA visits can be assigned when parts and site access are confirmed.

Route and technician

Nearest qualified option

Reyes is 18 minutes from the site and certified for the freezer unit.

Route fitReady

Parts readiness

Needed repair part

Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.

Parts checkReady

Site access

Dispatch blocker

Customer gate code is missing and must be collected before the technician is sent.

Access checkMissing

Recommended next action

Return to dispatch support for the gate code, then assign Reyes when access is confirmed.

Assignment option

Assigning now is blocked because site access is not confirmed, even though route and parts are ready.

Reschedule option

Do not reschedule for parts: the fan motor is available at the west depot.

SLA option

Escalate only if the access delay threatens the remaining service window.

Dispatch handoff

Ready to send after access detail

Reyes held as nearest qualified technician
Dispatch support collects Mallory Chen's gate code
Complete before SLA 4h service window closes
Route and parts are ready; site access is missing
Do not dispatch yet. Gate code must be confirmed before the technician travels to site.
